Ange din e-postadress så skickar vi en l: Enter your email address and we will send you a link to choose a new password.
Ett återställningslänk har skickats till: A reset link has been sent to your email if the address is registered. Check your Mailpit inbox!

Registreringen misslyckades, försök igen: Registration failed, please try again later
Registreringen lyckades. Ett verifiering: Registration successful. A verification email has been sent to your email address. Please click the link in the email to activate your account.
Vi använder personnummer för att verifie: We use personal identity numbers to verify your identity and ensure donations are handled safely and correctly. This helps us prevent fraud, protect both you and the athletes, and meet secure payment processing requirements.
Registrering av förening är endast tillå: Association registration is only permitted for persons over 18 years old.
Registrering av företag är endast tillåt: Company registration is only permitted for persons over 18 years old.
Eftersom du är under 13 år behöver din v: Since you are under 13 years old, your guardian needs to register you and enter their information for you to continue.
Det telefonnumer som anges kommet att va: The phone number provided will be the recipient for payments made in donations.
Lösenordet måste vara minst 8 tecken lån: Password must be at least 8 characters long
Lösenordet måste innehålla minst en stor: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter (A-Z)
Lösenordet måste innehålla minst en lite: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter (a-z)
Lösenordet måste innehålla minst en siff: Password must contain at least one digit (0-9)
Lösenordet måste innehålla minst ett spe: Password must contain at least one special character (!@#$ etc.)
Ange ditt nya önskade lösenord nedan för: Enter your new desired password below to update your account ({{email}}).
Ditt lösenord har ändrats utan problem!: Your password has been changed successfully!

Vänligen vänta medan vi bekräftar din e-: Please wait while we confirm your email address.
Ditt konto är nu aktiverat och klart. Vä: Your account is now activated and ready. Welcome to the Athletiqa team!
Blockerade användare kan inte se din pro: Blocked users cannot see your profile, your posts, or send messages to you.
Berätta om vad pengarna ska gå till: Tell us what the money will be used for
Berätta om din nya framgång, motgång ell: Tell us about your recent success, setback, or share how your practice session went!
När du raderar ditt konto försvinner din: When you delete your account, your profile, pictures, messages, and all other data will disappear permanently. You cannot restore the account afterwards.
Är du säker på att du vill lämna laget?: Are you sure you want to leave the team?
Om du fortsätter startar vi processen fö: If you continue, we will start the process to delete your account.
Ditt konto kommer att deaktiveras och in: Your account will be deactivated and no longer visible on the platform. It can take up to 7-30 days before all information is completely removed.
Du får även ett e-postmeddelande där du: You will also receive an email where you can cancel the deletion if you change your mind.
Du har nu fått ett e-postmeddelande där: You have now received an email where you need to confirm the deletion of your account. You can still cancel the process, both here and via the link in the email.
Vi håller platsen varm ifall du väljer a: We will keep your spot warm in case you choose to stay on the team.
Det telefonnummer som anges kommer att v: The phone number specified will be the recipient for the payments made in donations.
Här hittar du svar på vanliga frågor om: Here you will find answers to frequently asked questions about guardians and how the feature works on the platform.
Kontakta vår kundtjänst för hjälp: Contact our customer service for help
Har du frågor om funktioner, inställning: Do you have questions about features, settings, or your account? Here you will find answers to the most common questions and guides to help you further.
Du får välja max 5 sporter: You can choose a maximum of 5 sports
Om du väljer att vara anonym kommer vark: If you choose to be anonymous, neither other athletes nor sponsors will be able to see your identity.
Att vara anonym minskar dock chansen att: However, being anonymous reduces the chance of being sponsored, as sponsors often want to know who they are donating to.
För att kunna ta emot sponsring och utbe: In order to receive sponsorship and payouts, you need to connect your account to Stripe. Stripe is used to handle payments securely.
Hantera listan över användare du har blo: Manage the list of users you have blocked. Blocked users cannot see your profile, your posts, or send messages to you.
Vill du vara med på resan? Oavsett om du: Want to join the journey? Whether you are a young athlete ready to take the next step, a parent who wants to support, or a company looking to invest in the next generation – welcome to Athletiqa!
Du har inga aktiva insamlingar än: You have no active campaigns yet
Behöver du stöd i din idrottssatsning?: Need support in your sports endeavor?
Skapa en ny insamling där du kan be om s: Create a new campaign where you can ask for support for everything related to your sports life – from equipment to travel and match tickets.
Vill du dela något med din community?: Want to share something with your community?
Med inlägg kan du dela dina erfarenheter: With posts you can share your experiences and achievements - and even more!
Den här atleten har inte lagt upp någon: This athlete has not posted any active campaign yet.
Den här atleten har inte lagt upp några: This athlete has not posted any updates yet.
*Det är viktigt för oss att du känner di: *It is important to us that you feel safe when donating. Payments are made through secure, certified systems and your details are always protected. Read more about how we handle your donation here.
Du får ditt kvitto via e-post: You will receive your receipt via email

Välkommen till Athletiqa! Dessa köp- och: Welcome to Athletiqa! These purchase and donation terms apply when you as an individual or company choose to donate money to an athlete or association via our platform Athletiqa. Please read through the terms carefully before completing your payment.
När du genomför en transaktion på Athlet: When you complete a transaction on Athletiqa, you are making a voluntary donation. A donation is a gift with no requirement for consideration from either the athlete, the association, or Athletiqa. You are therefore not buying a product or a service.
Vi erbjuder trygga och säkra betalningar: We offer safe and secure payments through our partner Stripe. Depending on the chosen payment method, you can donate by credit card (Visa/Mastercard), direct bank transfer, or mobile payment methods. Your payment details are always handled encrypted by our payment provider and are not stored by Athletiqa.
Att skapa ett konto och donera via Athle: Creating an account and donating via Athletiqa is completely free for you as a donor. The amount you choose to donate is the exact amount deducted from your account.
Eftersom en donation är en frivillig gåv: Since a donation is a voluntary gift and not a purchase of a good or service, the statutory 14-day right of withdrawal under the Distance Contracts Act does not apply. All completed donations are final.
Återbetalning sker endast i undantagsfal: Refunds are only issued in exceptional cases, for example, if a technical error occurred and your payment was charged twice. If you suspect a technical error, contact our support immediately.
Atleterna och föreningarna förbinder sig: The athletes and associations commit in our Terms of Use to only use collected funds for the sports-related purposes stated in their campaign, such as tournament fees, equipment, or training camps.
Athletiqa granskar dock inte varje enski: Athletiqa does not review each individual's private expenses and is not liable for refunds if an athlete, against expectations, violates the platform rules.
Donationer till enskilda atleter via pla: Donations to individual athletes via the platform are normally not tax-deductible for individuals.
Företag ansvarar själva för att undersök: Companies are responsible for investigating applicable tax rules and whether their donation can be recorded as sponsorship or a gift according to the Swedish Tax Agency guidelines. Athletiqa only provides a receipt for the completed transaction.
När din donation har gått igenom skickas: Once your donation has been processed, a confirmation and a digital receipt will be sent to the email address you provided at payment or the one linked to your Athletiqa account. This serves as your transaction record.
Om du har problem med en betalning, sakn: If you have issues with a payment, are missing your receipt, or have other questions about your donation, you are always welcome to contact us!
Välkommen till Athletiqa! Vi värnar om d: Welcome to Athletiqa! We safeguard your personal privacy and want you to feel secure using our platform. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, share, and protect your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
1. Vilka personuppgifter samlar vi in?: 1. What personal data do we collect?
För att Athletiqa ska fungera samlar vi: For Athletiqa to function, we collect different types of information depending on how you use the service:
Namn, e-postadress, ålder, sporttillhöri: Name, email address, age, sports affiliation, profile picture, text descriptions in campaigns, and bank details (only for guardians) to be able to pay out collected funds.
Namn, företagsnamn, e-postadress och pro: Name, company name, email address, and profile picture/logo.
När en donation genomförs samlar vi in t: When a donation is completed, we collect transaction data. However, the card or bank details themselves are handled securely by our payment partner (Stripe) and are not saved in our systems.
Meddelanden som skickas i vår chattfunkt: Messages sent in our chat function, achieved milestones (medals), and posts published on the platform.
IP-adress, typ av enhet, webbläsare och: IP address, device type, browser, and information about how you navigate our platform (collected via cookies).
2. Varför samlar vi in uppgifterna? (Änd: 2. Why do we collect the data? (Purpose)
Vi använder dina personuppgifter för att: We use your personal data to:
Skapa och hantera ditt konto på Athletiq: Create and manage your account on Athletiqa.
Möjliggöra publicering av insamlingar oc: Enable the publication of campaigns and processing of donations.
Driva plattformens sociala funktioner (c: Drive the platform's social features (chat, posts, and milestone sharing).
Kommunicera med dig gällande uppdatering: Communicate with you regarding updates, support cases, or technical issues.
Förhindra bedrägerier, missbruk av platt: Prevent fraud, abuse of the platform, and ensure a secure environment for our young users.
Följa juridiska krav, såsom bokföringsla: Comply with legal requirements, such as the Accounting Act.
Eftersom Athletiqa vänder sig till unga: Since Athletiqa targets young athletes, we have extra high security requirements. For users under 18, explicit approval from a guardian is required to create a profile and receive donations. The guardian has the right at any time to request access to, or deletion of, the child's account.
4. Vem delar vi dina uppgifter med?: 4. Who do we share your data with?
Vi säljer aldrig dina personuppgifter ti: We never sell your personal data to third parties. However, we may need to share certain information with:
För att kunna genomföra och verifiera sä: To carry out and verify secure transactions.
Företag som tillhandahåller våra servrar: Companies providing our servers, cloud services, and customer support systems (these act as our data processors and are bound by strict agreements).
Om vi är skyldiga enligt lag, exempelvis: If we are required by law, for example, under suspicion of a crime or for tax reporting.
Observera att information du själv välje: Please note that information you choose to publish on your profile, in campaigns, or posts becomes public to visitors on the platform.
5. Hur länge sparar vi dina uppgifter?: 5. How long do we keep your data?
Vi sparar dina personuppgifter så länge: We keep your personal data as long as you have an active account with us. If you choose to close your account, your data is deleted or anonymized, with the exception of transaction history which we must save for 7 years according to the Accounting Act.
6. Hur skyddar vi dina uppgifter?: 6. How do we protect your data?
You always have power over your own data. Under the GDPR, you have the right to:
Begära ett registerutdrag på de uppgifte: Request a registry extract of the data we have about you.
Be oss korrigera felaktig eller ofullstä: Ask us to correct incorrect or incomplete information.
Begära att vi raderar dina personuppgift: Request that we delete your personal data (does not apply to data we must save by law).
Om vår behandling bygger på samtycke kan: If our processing is based on consent, you can withdraw it at any time.
Välkommen till Athletiqa! Dessa användar: Welcome to Athletiqa! These terms of use govern your use of our website and services. By creating an account or using the platform, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.
Athletiqa är en plattform som kopplar sa: Athletiqa is a platform connecting young athletes with individuals and companies who want to support their sports endeavors financially. We provide the technology to start campaigns, donate money, and communicate through our platform.
För att säkerställa en trygg miljö gälle: To ensure a secure environment, the following applies to account creation:
Du måste ha ett godkännande från en vård: You must have approval from a guardian to create an account and start a campaign. The guardian is legally and financially responsible for the account and the funds collected.
Du måste vara minst 18 år gammal för att: You must be at least 18 years old to create an account and make donations. Company accounts must be created by an authorized representative of the company.
Du är ansvarig för att hålla dina inlogg: You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential. Athletiqa is not responsible for unauthorized access resulting from you sharing your information.
3. Regler för Insamlingar - För atleter: 3. Campaign Rules - For athletes and guardians
När du startar en insamling förbinder du: When you start a campaign, you commit to:
All information i din profil och i dina: All information on your profile and in your campaigns must be truthful. You must not exaggerate or fabricate needs.
Donerade medel får endast användas till: Donated funds may only be used for the sports-related purpose stated in the campaign (e.g., tournament fees, equipment, travel).
Athletiqa kan inte garantera att din ins: Athletiqa cannot guarantee that your campaign reaches its goal.
4. Regler för Donationer - För sponsorer: 4. Donation Rules - For sponsors and individuals
När du donerar via Athletiqa godkänner d: When you donate via Athletiqa, you agree to the following:
Alla donationer sker frivilligt. Athleti: All donations are made voluntarily. Athletiqa is an intermediary platform and does not manually review every campaign in detail.
Genomförda donationer är slutgiltiga och: Completed donations are final and generally cannot be refunded through the platform, unless required by legislation or due to technical errors.
Donationer är gåvor för att stötta idrot: Donations are gifts to support athletes, not investments. You do not gain ownership or financial return for your contribution.
5. Uppförandekod och Chattfunktion: 5. Code of Conduct and Chat Feature
Athletiqa ska vara en trygg och peppande: Athletiqa must be a safe and encouraging place. The following is strictly prohibited and leads to immediate suspension:
Hatbrott, diskriminering, mobbning eller: Hate speech, discrimination, bullying, or harassment.
Delning av olagligt, pornografiskt eller: Sharing illegal, pornographic, or violent content.
Spam, vilseledande marknadsföring eller: Spam, misleading marketing, or fraud attempts.
Att kontakta unga atleter i syften som i: Contacting young athletes for purposes not related to supporting their sport participation.
Att skapa ett konto på Athletiqa är grat: Creating an account on Athletiqa is free. To process transactions, we use the third-party provider Stripe. With each donation, a small transaction fee may be added to cover bank costs and platform operation. This is clearly shown during payment processing.
Vi värnar om din integritet. Hur vi saml: We care about your privacy. How we collect, store, and handle your personal data, including pictures and chat logs, is regulated in our Privacy Policy, designed in compliance with the GDPR.
Athletiqa ansvarar inte för tvister mell: Athletiqa is not responsible for disputes between donors and athletes, or for athletes achieving specific results. We do not guarantee that the platform will always be free from technical disruptions or errors, but we work continuously to offer as stable a service as possible.
Athletiqa förbehåller sig rätten att när: Athletiqa reserves the right to close accounts or remove campaigns at any time and without notice if they violate these terms or Swedish law.
Vi kan komma att uppdatera dessa villkor: We may update these terms. In the event of major changes, we will notify registered users via email or through a clear notice on the platform.
Utforska och hitta fler talanger som du: Explore and find more talents that you can help further along their sports journey.
